name: Cactus Chicken Fried Steak
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Instant Chicken Bouillon (OR 1 tbsp Chicken Base)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a shallow dish, mix together the jalapeno seasoning salt and flour. Dip each steak into this seasoned flour mixture.
2. In another shallow dish, beat together the eggs and water for the egg wash.
3. Dip each coated steak back into the seasoned flour mixture.
4. Heat vegetable oil in a large skillet to 350°F (175°C). The oil should be deep enough to cover the steaks when added.
5. Carefully place the coated steaks into the hot oil, frying until golden brown. Drain on paper towels and transfer to a warmed serving platter covered with foil.
6. Remove all but 2 tablespoons of the used oil from the skillet using a slotted spoon. Discard the remaining drippings.
7. Sprinkle the reserved seasoned flour over the hot oil in the skillet, stirring constantly until it turns golden brown.
8. Add milk and chicken bouillon (or chicken base). Return to heat and bring to a simmer while stirring continuously until the gravy thickens.
9. Spoon the gravy over the steaks for serving.
